title: scorzoneroides atlantica
intro: Scorzoneroides atlantica, also known as the Atlantic scorpion grass or Devil's-bit scabious, is a flowering plant native to the Atlantic coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been found to have various medicinal properties. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides atlantica include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as having antioxidant and antiviral effects. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves, flowers, and roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
